data.title: Article emphasizes importance of pursuing dreams despite lack of support. Offers guidance on staying motivated.
data.description: In the face of unsupportive individuals or those who actively discourage your ambitious goals, staying determined can be challenging. However, it is essential to maintain belief in your dreams despite negative reactions. By staying focused on your objectives and blocking out naysayers, you can persevere and chase success. It is crucial to remain steadfast in your aspirations even in the face of skepticism or opposition.

data.title: Calumet (NASDAQ: CLMT) to participate at UBS Global Energy & Utilities Winter Conference on Jan. 13, 2026, with investor meetings.
data.description: Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT) based in Indianapolis, disclosed its participation in the UBS Global Energy & Utilities Winter Conference on January 13, 2026. The company intends to attend the event and conduct individual investor meetings on the same day. This news was shared on January 9, 2026.

data.title: Schrödinger (SDGR) collaborates with Lilly to integrate TuneLab platform in LiveDesign for drug discovery.
data.description: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR) revealed a partnership with Lilly TuneLab™, an initiative from Eli Lilly and Company, aimed at expediting drug discovery and development through cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) tools. This collaboration will integrate TuneLab into Schrödinger's LiveDesign platform, a popular enterprise informatics system, serving as the primary interface for biotech firms involved to utilize TuneLab workflows efficiently. This venture is intended to streamline the utilization of advanced AI capabilities in the drug development sector.

data.title: Bruker secures $500M in orders for high-performance superconductors for MRI from global healthcare companies.
data.description: In Hanau, Germany, Bruker Energy & Supercon Technologies (BEST), a division of Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR), revealed signing two long-term supply agreements for their latest superconductors. These superconductors are essential for global radiology firms in constructing advanced MRI magnets. The total worth of both agreements is around $500 million, projected to contribute to BEST revenues over the coming years. The agreements vary in length, offering significant growth opportunities for BEST in the MRI market.

data.title: Pulse Biosciences appoints Maria Sainz to Board of Directors effective January 9, 2026, leveraging nPulse™ technology.
data.description: In Hayward, California, Pulse Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLSE) revealed the addition of Maria Sainz to its Board of Directors starting January 9, 2026. The company specializes in its innovative nPulse™ technology, employing its exclusive Nanosecond Pulsed Field Ablation™ (nanosecond PFA or nsPFA™) energy. Co-Chairman of the Board, Robert W. Duggan, expressed enthusiasm about Sainz joining the board, noting her remarkable performance track record.

data.title: Caring Senior Service opens new location in Fort Myers, Florida providing personalized support for retirement community.
data.description: A renowned home care provider has launched a branch in FORT MYERS, Florida, on January 9, 2026. Caring Senior Service specializes in tailored non-medical assistance for the increasing retirement population in the region. This award-winning company is dedicated to offering personalized support to cater to the specific needs of the community.

data.title: Polestar had a record year in 2025 with retail sales of 60,119 cars, up 34% from 2024, including 15,608 cars sold in Q4. CEO Michael Lohscheller credits market share growth.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Polestar reported robust retail sales for the fourth quarter of 2025, with an estimated 15,608 cars sold, marking a 27% increase compared to Q4 2024. The full-year retail sales for 2025 reached around 60,119 cars, showcasing a noteworthy 34% growth from the previous year. Polestar CEO, Michael Lohscheller, expressed satisfaction with the performance, stating that 2025 has been a record-breaking year for the company in terms of retail sales volume despite facing tough market conditions. Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY) continues to gain market share and surpass many established car manufacturers in the industry.

data.title: Ping An Biomedical receives strategic investments from industry leaders; including Yao Jinbo, Wang Donghui, and Li Daxue.
data.description: Ping An Biomedical, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker PASW, recently received investments from prominent individuals in the industry. Yao Jinbo from 58.com, Wang Donghui from Amiba Capital, and Li Daxue from Magcloud were among the investors in this funding round. This strategic move is likely to strengthen Ping An Biomedical's position in the market and facilitate its growth moving forward.

data.title: La Rosa Holdings Corp. closed an $11 million note under a $250 million facility, part of a $1.25 billion AI program.
data.description: Celebration, FL - On January 9, 2026, La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC), a real estate and PropTech company, stated the completion of an initial $11,000,000 note out of the $250 million private placement convertible note facility. This brings the Company’s total financing capacity to $1.25 billion when combined with the existing $1 billion equity purchase facility. La Rosa plans to use this funding to create a strategic reserve, granting it the flexibility and financial capability to expand its AI infrastructure strategy and build a premium real estate collection comprising cutting-edge data center facilities optimized for AI operations.

data.title: uniQure to meet FDA for AMT-130 approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy. Type A meeting to review BLA data.
data.description: A meeting has been set between uniQure N.V. and the U.S. FDA in regards to the Biologics License Application for AMT-130, the investigational gene therapy for Huntington’s disease. This event will take place in Lexington, Mass. and Amsterdam on Jan. 9, 2026. uniQure N.V., a renowned gene therapy company, aims to provide innovative treatments for patients with serious medical conditions. The discussion will focus on the data package supporting the accelerated approval of AMT-130. The company’s stock is listed as QURE on NASDAQ.

data.title: AHN hospitals win 2026 Specialty Excellence Care Awards, Allegheny General Hospital ranks top for cardiac surgery.
data.description: In the latest rankings released on January 9, 2026, Allegheny General Hospital, part of the Allegheny Health Network (AHN), has emerged as the leading medical facility in the state for cardiac surgery. Additionally, the hospital has received national recognition for its exceptional cardiovascular care and coronary intervention services. This achievement underscores AHN's commitment to providing top-quality healthcare. The recognition further solidifies Allegheny General Hospital's reputation as a premier healthcare provider in the region. The high rankings reflect the dedication and expertise of the medical professionals at AHN.

data.title: Nobel announces non-brokered private placement offering for distribution in Canada, not authorized in the US.
data.description: This press release is intended for distribution exclusively in Canada and is not permitted for distribution to United States news wire services or for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Grayscale initiates trusts connected to potential BNB and HYPE ETFs, precursor to possible ETF filings.
data.description: Grayscale has filed Delaware trusts associated with possible BNB and HYPE ETPs, a common precursor to ETF submissions.

data.title: Ocugen CEO to present at J.P. Morgan 2026 Healthcare Conference on Jan 15th, discussing gene therapy progress.
data.description: Ocugen, Inc., a biotechnology company specializing in gene therapies for blindness diseases, will present at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. Dr. Shankar Musunuri, Chairman and CEO of Ocugen, will lead the presentation, discussing the company's modifier gene therapy platform and clinical development progress. Ocugen aims to file three Biologics License Applications (BLAs) over the next two years, including the rolling BLA of OCU400 for retinitis pigmentosa in 2026. The presentation will take place on January 15, 2026, at The Westin St. Francis in San Francisco. A live webcast will be available on the Ocugen investor site. The company's gene therapies target inherited retinal diseases and blindness conditions like Stargardt disease and age-related macular degeneration. For more information, visit www.ocugen.com.

data.title: H&R Block offers free tax pro review for new clients with purchase of DIY products, enhancing digital experience.
data.description: Enhancing consumers' digital-first experience by integrating H&R Block's tax professional knowledge. This initiative aims to leverage the expertise of H&R Block's tax professionals to provide a seamless digital experience for customers. This move is expected to significantly improve user interaction and satisfaction rates by bringing together the convenience of digital platforms with the proficiency of tax professionals. This step underscores the company's commitment to innovation and customer-centricity.

data.title: Aircraft Avionics MRO market to reach $10.3 Bn by 2035, growing at 3.8% CAGR from $7.1 Bn in 2024. Source: ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A recent report on the Aircraft Avionics MRO Market reveals that it was valued at US$7.1 billion in 2024, with a projected growth to US$10.3 billion by 2035, indicating a CAGR of 3.8% over the forecast period. The aviation industry is driving this growth with various factors influencing the market dynamics.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) to participate in 2026 ICR Conference with CEO and CFO presenting in Orlando.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) disclosed its participation at the 2026 ICR Conference in Orlando, Florida. The company, a frontrunner in technology-driven financial solutions for underserved consumers, will have its CEO Fahmi Karam and CFO Hal Khouri partake in a Fireside Chat on January 13 at 3:30 PM ET. The event will feature a live webcast for accessibility.
